children.label: i
children.text: identifies the person in violation of this chapter; and

children.label: ii
children.text: supplies information that leads to the successful collection of a civil penalty by the Commission; and

children.label: B
children.text: procedures to minimize the burden of submitting a complaint to the Commission concerning violations of this chapter, including procedures to allow the electronic submission of complaints to the Commission; and

a report, within 18 months after , that sets forth a plan for requiring commercial electronic mail to be identifiable from its subject line, by means of compliance with Internet Engineering Task Force Standards, the use of the characters “ADV” in the subject line, or other comparable identifier, or an explanation of any concerns the Commission has that cause the Commission to recommend against the plan.December 16, 2003
